name: Ravenswood Golf Club
address: 4711 N Ravenswood Ave Second Floor, Chicago, IL 60640
about: Ravenswood Golf Club is an indoor urban golf oasis in Chicago featuring eight Trackman simulators and a 1000 sq. ft. chipping and putting area. The club offers a year-round golf experience with two lounges equipped with 10' video walls, making it suitable for both practice and social events. It provides PGA-certified instruction and hosts leagues, parties, and tournaments, catering to golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Dedicated chipping and putting area for short game practice
Spacious lounges with large TVs for watching sports
Year-round leagues and social events for community engagement
PGA-certified instruction available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Eight Trackman simulators, all-digital Trackman facility
